data.body: CHECKPOINT 5/6: Fix implemented. Changes: (1) implementation-plan SKILL.md: rewrote termination directive — removed conditional halt language, added unconditional anti-halt and return-to-caller framing; (2) sprint SKILL.md: replaced blockquote ORCHESTRATOR_RESUME with XML-tagged MANDATORY CONTINUATION directive at both Phase 2 and Step 3a call sites; (3) CLAUDE.md: added rule 26 — never edit plugin cache files. Pending: commit via workflow.
